title: Pipe-ify normalize/1 (intermediate-variable chain)
prompt: Refactor MyApp.TextProcessor.normalize/1 from test_fixtures/intermediate_vars.ex into a single pipe pipeline. Drop the intermediate variables (`trimmed`, `downcased`, `stripped`, `collapsed`, `final`) and chain the five calls with `|>`. Output only the `normalize/1` function inside `defmodule MyApp.TextProcessor do ... end`.
